titleStmt.title: SII 37.53: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 53. (A.R. No. B 374 of 1938-39.) Eguvapalle, hamlet of Guṟṟaṁpaḍu, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Narasimha temple.
This is dated Śaka 1470, Kīlaka, Māgha śu. 7, corresponding to 1549 A.D., January 6, Sunday.

It records the grant of Sarvamānya right on the karaṇika-mānya lands vṛitti-mānya lands and wet-lands (vari-meḷḷu) by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chinna Timmayyadēvamahārāja, son of Timmarāja, grandson of Rāmarāja and great grandson of Āravīṭi Bukkarāja, to Murāri, the Karaṇam of Aṁbavaram, on the holy occasion of rathasaptami. Aṁbavaram is mentioned as hōra-grāma and as situated in the Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma.

A post-script, which is in verse, states that a brāhmaṇa though he takes up the job of writing letters etc., does not lose his caste as some of the brāhmaṇas follow vaidika-mārga and some are niyōgis.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1470 Agunēṭi kīlaka saṁvatsara māgha śudha 7 lu . śrīmadrājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivadēva mahā
rāyalugāru vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvīsāṁ
mrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmaṁmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Ātrēya
gōtra pavitṛlaiyina sōmavaṁśādhīśvarulāyna śrīkṛṣna pādāraviṁda
dvitīyya śāvakulaina nissīma bhūdāna cakravartulaina paramadhārmi
kulaina padavākyapramāṇagñulaina Āravīṭi bukkarājugāri pavutṛlu rā
marājuṁgāri pautṛlu tiṁmarājuṁgāri putṛlu cinatiṁma
yyadēvamahārājulu Aṁbavaraṁ grāmakaraṇaṁ murā
rigāriki yiccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . śrīsadāsivadēvamahārā
yaluṁgāru māku nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina gaṁḍikōṭa
sīmalōni hōragrāmaṁ Aṁbavaraṁ karaṇaṁ murārigāri kara
ṇikai mānyālaku vritti mānyālaku varimaḷakunnu koṁnnamā
ḷlu yī radhasaptami puṁṇyakālamaṁdu dhāravōsi sarvamānyaṁ
gā [I]stimigāna mīputra pautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrārkkastā
yigānu Anubhaviṁci bratikēdi . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yyō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyā
ṁ jāyatē krimi . yēkaiva bhaginīlōkē sarvvaṣāṁ yēva bhū
bhuja [.] na bhōjyā nakaragrāhya vipradattā vasuṁdharā .
braṁhavaktramunanudbhavayaina brāhmalu koṁdarācāryu
laiyi yuṁdurepuḍu . varusalō koṁdaru vaidika mārga
muna cenuṁḍanuṁduru siddhamuganu niyōgulayi
koṁdarayyeḍa koṁdaru nītikāryaprāvudi negaḍu ko
raku vāsigā lēkhalu vrāsina māṁtrāna sūdṟlu
gāru bhūsurulugāni viprasaṁhvaticālaku vīsa
maina paṭtanani munne satyaṁbu balikināvu ganaka
haṁbu karuṇabrōvu rāmabhūpāla
cinatiṁmarājaceṁdrā śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 37.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
